title: GlobalLink Translation Entry
description: Logical structure describing a translatable string entry exposed by the GlobalLink Strings REST API. Captures the identifier, locale, content, workflow state, contextual references, and audit fields used by mobile and software localization pipelines.

fields.name: key
fields.description: Stable identifier for the translatable string within the owning project.

fields.name: language
fields.description: BCP-47 locale tag identifying the language of the entry value.

fields.name: value
fields.description: Source or translated string content for the entry.

fields.name: branch
fields.description: Branch identifier scoping the entry when the project uses branching workflows.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Labels associated with the entry for filtering pushes, pulls, releases, and orders.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Developer note or contextual description shown to translators.

fields.name: screenshotIds
fields.description: References to uploaded screenshots that anchor the entry visually.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Workflow state of the entry within the translation pipeline.

fields.name: characterLimit
fields.description: Optional maximum character count enforced on the translated value.

fields.name: plural
fields.description: Indicates whether the entry uses plural-form variants.

fields.name: pluralForms
fields.description: Plural variant strings keyed by CLDR plural category.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the entry was created.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the entry was last modified.

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Free-form integrator metadata attached to the entry.
